+----------+   +-------------+
|  Output  |<+-+  Transform  |<
+----------+ | +-------------+
             |               |   +-----------+  +---------+
             |               +---+  Process  |<-|  Input  |
             |               |   +-----------+  +---------+
             |               |
             |  +------------+
             +--+  Validate  |<
                +------------+
